revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Bots]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Bots]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:47:00 on [[Template:Bots]]
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:Bots/doc]]
<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: categorize articles that use this
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0|[[Category:Wikipedia articles using the bots or nobots templates]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Implementing talk page edit requested by [[User:DannyS712]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude> {{#if:{{{optout|}}}|{{#invoke:Bots|check_mass_message|{{{optout}}}}}}}

revision.comment: trim whitespace
revision.text: {{#if:{{{optout|}}}|{{#invoke:Bots|check_mass_message|{{{optout}}}}}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Replace [[Module:Bots]] per TfD
revision.text: {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|[[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: add tracking category for articles using this template
revision.text: {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|[[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]]}}{{main other|[[Category:Articles using nobots template]]|{{{deny|1}}}]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: shit
revision.text: {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|[[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]]}}{{main other|[[Category:Articles using nobots template|{{{deny|1}}}]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: to prevent emitting a newline
revision.text: <nowiki />{{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|[[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Restored revision 1045698529 by [[Special:Contributions/Primefac|Primefac]] ([[User talk:Primefac|talk]])
revision.text: {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|[[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|[[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|[[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|[[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bots here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bots for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#if:{{#invoke:String|match|{{{optout}}}|MassMessage|ignore_errors=1}}|}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Wikipedians who opt out of message delivery]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
